title: Dentaria × paxiana
taxonomy: Dentaria × paxiana is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a cross between the species Dentaria bulbifera and Dentaria laciniata. The classification of Dentaria × paxiana is a complex topic, but it is generally accepted as a hybrid species within the genus Dentaria. Dentaria × paxiana is not a natural hybrid but was created by botanists. It is often used in botanical research and as an ornamental plant.
